description: Ọmụmụ ihe ndị na-enyocha akwụkwọ ndị e dere tupu Kraịst abịa — site n'Iwu na Ndị Amụma ruo n'Akwụkwọ Nsọ. Agba Ochie na-akọ akụkọ ọgbụgba ndụ Chineke na Izrel ma na-atụ aka na Mezaịa.

sections.description: Akwụkwọ ise mbụ nke Baịbụl (Pentateuch), nke gụnyere ihe e kere eke, ọdịda, ọpụpụ, na inye Iwu — ntọala nke akụkụ Akwụkwọ Nsọ ndị ọzọ na-ewulite.

subsections.name: Jenesis
subsections.description: Akwụkwọ nke mmalite: okike, ọdịda, na ndị nna ochie — Abraham, Aịzik, Jekọb, na Josef.

subsections.name: Ọpụpụ
subsections.description: Chineke napụtara ndị ya n'ohu n'Ijipt, kpughee aha ya, ma nye Iwu ya na Saịnaị.

subsections.name: Levitikọs
subsections.description: Ntuziaka maka ofufe na ịdị nsọ, nke na-egosi otu ndị mmehie nwere ike isi bịaruo Chineke dị nsọ nso.

subsections.name: Ọnụọgụgụ
subsections.description: Njem ọzara nke Izrel — ọdịda ya, ịdọ aka ná ntị ya, na ikwesị ntụkwasị obi Chineke na-aga n'ihu.

subsections.name: Deuteronomium
subsections.description: Okwu Mozis ji katọọ ndị Izrel, ime ka ọgbụgba ndụ ahụ dị ọhụrụ ma kwadebe ha ka ha banye n'Ala Nkwa ahụ.

sections.description: Akwụkwọ akụkọ ihe mere eme na-akọwa akụkọ Izrel site na mmeri Kenan ruo n'ọchịchị eze, ndọrọ n'agha, na nlọghachi — na-egosi ikwesị ntụkwasị obi Chineke na enweghị ntụkwasị obi nke ndị ya ugboro ugboro.

subsections.name: Joshua
subsections.description: Mmeri na nkewa nke Ala Nkwa ahụ n'okpuru nduzi Joshua.

subsections.name: Ndị Ikpe
subsections.description: Usoro nnupụisi, mmegbu, na nnapụta ka Izrel na-agbanwekarị site n'ebe Chineke nọ.

subsections.name: Rut
subsections.description: Akụkọ banyere iguzosi ike n'ihe, nlekọta, na mgbapụta nke e guzobere n'oge ndị ikpe.

subsections.name: 1 Samuel
subsections.description: Mgbanwe site n'aka ndị ikpe gaa n'aka ndị eze: Samuel, Sọl, na mbilite nke Devid.

subsections.name: 2 Samuel
subsections.description: Ọchịchị Devid — mmeri ya, ọdịda ya, na ọgbụgba ndụ Chineke na ụlọ ya.

subsections.name: Ndị Eze 1
subsections.description: Ebube Solomọn na nkewa nke alaeze ahụ; Ịlaịja na asọmpi ahụ n'Ugwu Kamel.

subsections.name: Ndị Eze Abụọ
subsections.description: Ọdịda na ọdịda nke alaeze abụọ ahụ, nke mechara bụrụ mba ọzọ.

subsections.name: 1 Ihe E Mere
subsections.description: Ịkọghachi akụkọ ihe mere eme nke Izrel site n'Adam ruo Devid, lekwasịrị anya n'ofufe na ụlọ nsọ ahụ.

subsections.name: 2 Ihe E Mere
subsections.description: Solomọn na ụlọ nsọ ahụ, alaeze kewara ekewa, na olileanya nke mweghachi.

subsections.name: Ezra
subsections.description: Nlaghachi site na ndọrọ n'agha na iwughachi ụlọ nsọ ahụ n'okpuru nduzi Ezra.

subsections.name: Nehemaịa
subsections.description: Ịrụgharị mgbidi Jerusalem na ime ka obodo ọgbụgba ndụ dị ọhụrụ.

subsections.name: Esta
subsections.description: Chineke nke zoro ezo na-echebe ndị ya n'obí eze Peshia.

sections.description: Job, Abụ Ọma, Ilu, Eklisiastis, na Abụ Abụ — akwụkwọ ndị na-enyocha omimi nke ahụmịhe mmadụ: nhụjuanya, otuto, amamihe, na ịhụnanya.

subsections.name: Ọrụ
subsections.description: Nnyocha miri emi nke ahụhụ, ikpe ziri ezi, na ihe omimi nke ụzọ Chineke.

subsections.name: Abụ Ọma
subsections.description: Akwụkwọ abụ na akwụkwọ ekpere nke Izrel — ụdị mmetụta uche mmadụ niile e wetara n'ihu Chineke.

subsections.name: Ilu
subsections.description: Amamihe bara uru maka ndụ kwa ụbọchị, nke sitere n'egwu Onyenwe anyị.

subsections.name: Ekliziastis
subsections.description: Nnyocha nyocha nke ihe ọ pụtara, ọrụ, na ọnwụ 'n'okpuru anyanwụ'.

subsections.name: Abụ nke Abụ
subsections.description: Ememe ịhụnanya na alụmdi na nwunye, jupụtara na onyonyo nke obi ụtọ na agụụ.

sections.description: Akwụkwọ amụma kpọrọ Izrel ka ha chegharịa, dọọ aka ná ntị maka ikpe, ma tụọ aka n'ọgbụgbapụta Chineke nke ikpeazụ. Ha dị mkpa maka nghọta nke mmezu nke Agba Ọhụrụ nke nkwa ndị ahụ.

subsections.name: Aịzaịa
subsections.description: Ikpe na olileanya na-akpali akpali — gụnyere Abụ Ohu nke na-ezo aka na Kraịst.

subsections.name: Jeremaịa
subsections.description: Obi mgbawa nke onye amụma mgbe Jerusalem dara, na nkwa nke ọgbụgba ndụ ọhụrụ.

subsections.name: Abụ Ákwá
subsections.description: Iru újú dị egwu maka mbibi Jerusalem, nke olileanya n'ikwesị ntụkwasị obi Chineke jigide.

subsections.name: Ezikiel
subsections.description: Ọhụụ nke ebube Chineke na-apụ ma na-alọghachi, na nkwa nke ime ka mmụọ dị ọhụrụ.

subsections.name: Daniel
subsections.description: Ịnọ n'ebe a na-akwaga mba ọzọ n'okwukwe, na ọhụụ nke alaeze Chineke nke ga-achị mba niile.

subsections.name: Hosia
subsections.description: Ịhụnanya na-adịghị agwụ agwụ nke Chineke nwere n'ebe ndị na-ekwesịghị ntụkwasị obi nọ, nke e sere onyinyo ya site n'alụmdi na nwunye Hosia.

subsections.name: Joel
subsections.description: Ihe otiti igurube dị ka oku maka nchegharị, na nkwa nke Mmụọ Nsọ.

subsections.name: Emọs
subsections.description: Oku amụma dị nkọ maka ikpe ziri ezi na ịdọ aka ná ntị na okpukpe efu agaghị adịte aka.

subsections.name: Obadaịa
subsections.description: Okwu dị mkpirikpi megide Edom na ụbọchị Onyenwe anyị na-abịa.

subsections.name: Jona
subsections.description: Ọmịiko Chineke nwere maka mba dị iche iche — na mmegide nke onye amụma na-ala azụ megide ya.

subsections.name: Maịka
subsections.description: Ikpe ziri ezi, ebere, na ịdị umeala n'obi — na nkwa nke onye ọchịchị si Betlehem.

subsections.name: Nahọm
subsections.description: Ọdịda nke Nineve na nkasi obi nke ikpe ziri ezi Chineke nye ndị ya a na-emegbu.

subsections.name: Habakọk
subsections.description: Ịgbaso Chineke mgba n'eziokwu megide ikpe na-ezighị ezi, na ịmụta ịtụkwasị obi n'oge ya.

subsections.name: Zefanaya
subsections.description: Ụbọchị nke Onyenwe anyị na ọṅụ nke mweghachi maka ihe fọdụrụ e mere ka ha dị ọcha.

subsections.name: Hagaị
subsections.description: Ọkpụkpọ oku ka e wughachi ụlọ nsọ ahụ ma tinye ụlọ Chineke n'ọnọdụ dị mkpa karịa nkasi obi onwe onye.

subsections.name: Zekaraịa
subsections.description: Ọhụụ nke mweghachi na Mesaịa nke ji obi umeala bịa n'elu ịnyịnya ibu.

subsections.name: Malakaị
subsections.description: Ọkpụkpọ oku ikpeazụ maka ikwesị ntụkwasị obi tupu ogologo oge ahụ dị jụụ n'ihu Jọn Onye Na-eme Baptizim.

description: Ọmụmụ ihe dị n'akwụkwọ ndị e dere mgbe Kraịst bịasịrị - Oziọma, akwụkwọ ozi nke ndịozi, na Mkpughe. Agba Ọhụrụ na-ekpughe mmezu nke nkwa Chineke n'ime Jisọs na ndụ nke chọọchị mbụ.

sections.description: Akụkọ anọ gbasara ndụ Jizọs, ọnwụ ya, na mbilite n'ọnwụ ya, na akụkọ gbasara mgbasawanye nke chọọchị mbụ n'ụwa niile nke ndị Rom.

subsections.name: Matiu
subsections.description: Jizọs dịka mmezu nke Agba Ochie, Mozis ọhụrụ, na Eze nke alaeze Chineke.

subsections.name: Mak
subsections.description: Akụkọ dị ngwa ngwa gbasara Jizọs dịka Ohu na Ọkpara Chineke nke na-ata ahụhụ.

subsections.name: Luk
subsections.description: Jizọs dịka Onye Nzọpụta nke ụwa — na nlebara anya pụrụ iche nye ndị ogbenye, ụmụ nwanyị, na ndị si mba ọzọ.

subsections.name: Jọn
subsections.description: Ihe osise okpukpe kacha omimi nke Jisọs — Okwu ahụ mere ka anụ ahụ bụrụ anụ ahụ, Abụ m, Ọkpara Chineke.

subsections.name: Ọrụ Ndịozi
subsections.description: Mmụọ Nsọ na-enye ụka ike iburu ozi ọma site na Jerusalem ruo nsọtụ ụwa.

sections.description: Akwụkwọ ozi Pọl degaara ụka na ndị mmadụ n'otu n'otu — inyocha echiche nke ozi ọma, omume Ndị Kraịst, na ọdịdị nke ụka.

subsections.name: Ndị Rom
subsections.description: Nkọwa kachasị mma nke ozi ọma Pọl nyere: mmehie, ikpe ziri ezi, nsọ, na olileanya.

subsections.name: 1 Ndị Kọrịnt
subsections.description: Ịza nkewa na nsogbu dị iche iche na Kọrịnt, site n'izi ihe gbasara ịhụnanya, onyinye, na mbilite n'ọnwụ.

subsections.name: Ndị Kọrịnt nke Abụọ
subsections.description: Ngọpụ Pọl maka ozi ya na ihe mgbagwoju anya nke ike site n'adịghị ike.

subsections.name: Ndị Galeshia
subsections.description: Ngọpụ siri ike nke izi ezi site n'okwukwe naanị megide ndị na-agbakwụnye iwu.

subsections.name: Ndị Efesọs
subsections.description: Akụ̀ nke njirimara onye kwere ekwe n'ime Kraịst, na chọọchị dịka mmadụ ọhụrụ nke Chineke.

subsections.name: Ndị Filipaị
subsections.description: Ọṅụ n'ọnọdụ niile na ihe nlereanya nke ịdị umeala n'obi Kraịst.

subsections.name: Ndị Kọlọsi
subsections.description: Kraịst dịka onye kachasị ihe niile, na ihe ndị metụtara ndụ kwa ụbọchị.

subsections.name: Ndị Tesalonaịka nke Mbụ
subsections.description: Nkwanye ume maka ụka na-eto eto, ya na nkuzi maka nlọghachi Kraịst.

subsections.name: Ndị Tesalonaịka nke Abụọ
subsections.description: Ndozi nghọtahie gbasara oge ọgwụgwụ, na oku maka ọrụ kwesịrị ntụkwasị obi.

subsections.name: 1 Timoti
subsections.description: Ntuziaka maka ndụ ụka, nduzi, na ozizi dị mma.

subsections.name: 2 Timoti
subsections.description: Akwụkwọ ozi ikpeazụ nke Pọl — iwu o nyere Timoti ka o chebe ozi ọma ahụ ma mechaa nke ọma.

subsections.name: Taịtọs
subsections.description: Ịhọpụta ndị ndu na ịkụziri na ozizi dị mma na-eduga ná ndụ nsọpụrụ Chineke.

subsections.name: Faịlimọn
subsections.description: Arịrịọ nkeonwe maka ime udo na ihe ozi ọma pụtara n'etiti mmadụ na ibe ya.

sections.description: Akwụkwọ ozi sitere n'aka Jems, Pita, Jọn, Jud, na ndị ọzọ — na-ekwu maka okwukwe n'ọnwụnwa, nkwenye ezi, ozizi ụgha, na olileanya kachasị elu nke Mkpughe.

subsections.name: Ndị Hibru
subsections.description: Jizọs dịka mmezu nke ọrụ nchụaja, àjà, na ọgbụgba ndụ niile nke Agba Ochie — nke ka mma n'ụzọ niile.

subsections.name: Jemes
subsections.description: Okwukwe nke na-arụ ọrụ — amamihe bara uru maka ibi ndụ dịka ndị Chineke n'ụwa.

subsections.name: 1 Pita
subsections.description: Olileanya na ibi ndụ dị nsọ maka ndị a dọọrọ n'agha n'ụwa nke ndị iro.

subsections.name: Pita nke Abụọ
subsections.description: Ịdọ aka ná ntị megide ndị ozizi ụgha na ntụkwasị obi n'ime nkwa Chineke.

subsections.name: 1 Jọn
subsections.description: Nkwenye nke nzọpụta na akara nke ezigbo okwukwe: ịhụnanya, nrubeisi, na eziokwu.

subsections.name: 2 Jọn
subsections.description: Akwụkwọ ozi dị mkpirikpi gbasara ịhụnanya, eziokwu, na ịnabataghị ndị na-agọnarị Kraịst.

subsections.name: 3 Jọn
subsections.description: Ịja onye ọbịa nke ọma ma dọọ aka ná ntị megide ndị ndu na-achọ ọdịmma onwe ha nanị.

subsections.name: Jud
subsections.description: Oku siri ike ka a lụso okwukwe ọgụ megide ozizi ụgha nke batara n'ime chọọchị.

subsections.name: Mkpughe
subsections.description: Ọhụụ nke mmeri ikpeazụ Chineke ga-emeri ihe ọjọọ, ikpe nke ndị ajọ omume, na ime ka ihe niile dị ọhụrụ.

description: Ọmụmụ ihe lekwasịrị anya n'ozizi Ndị Kraịst - ihe Baịbụl na-akụzi gbasara Chineke, ụmụ mmadụ, nzọpụta, na ọdịnihu. Itinye onwe anyị n'okwukwe ziri ezi bụ ntọala maka ibi ndụ ziri ezi.

sections.description: Ọmụmụ ihe mmeghe nke na-enyocha ozizi Ndị Kraịst dum - ozi ọma, ozizi ndị bụ isi, na nkwupụta akụkọ ihe mere eme nke ụka.

subsections.name: Ntọala
subsections.description: Ihe ndị dị mkpa maka nkwenye Ndị Kraịst — ihe onye ọ bụla kwere ekwe kwesịrị ịma.

subsections.name: Oziọma ahụ
subsections.description: Ọmụmụ ihe lekwasịrị anya n'isi ihe dị n'ozi Ndị Kraịst: mmehie, amara, na nzọpụta site na Kraịst.

subsections.name: Okwukwe na Nkwupụta
subsections.description: Okwu okwukwe ndị mere eme nke kọwara Iso Ụzọ Kraịst Ọtọdọks n'ime ọtụtụ narị afọ.

sections.description: Ònye bụ Chineke? Ọmụmụ ihe na-enyocha Atọ n'Ime Otu, àgwà Chineke, na ihe ọ pụtara ịmara ya nke ọma.

subsections.name: Àgwà Chineke
subsections.description: Ịdị nsọ nke Chineke, ịhụnanya ya, ọbụbụeze ya, ikpe ziri ezi ya, na ihe ndị ọzọ Akwụkwọ Nsọ na-ekpughe.

subsections.name: Atọ n'Ime Otu
subsections.description: Otu Chineke n'ime mmadụ atọ — Nna, Ọkpara, na Mmụọ Nsọ — na ihe kpatara nke a ji dị mkpa.

subsections.name: Chineke Nna
subsections.description: Chineke dịka Onye Okike, Eze, na Nna — na ihe ọ pụtara ịbụ nwa ya.

sections.description: Ọmụmụ ihe gbasara Baịbụl n'onwe ya — otú o si malite, ihe ọ na-ekwu gbasara onwe ya, na otu esi agụ ya nke ọma.

subsections.name: Ọchịchị
subsections.description: Ihe mere Baịbụl ji nwee ikike ikwu okwu gbasara akụkụ niile nke ndụ.

subsections.name: Mkpalite mmụọ nsọ
subsections.description: Otu Chineke si jiri ndị dere mmadụ rụọ ọrụ iji nye anyị Okwu ya.

subsections.name: Kanọn
subsections.description: Otu esi amata ma chịkọta akwụkwọ dị na Baịbụl.

subsections.name: Nkọwa
subsections.description: Ụkpụrụ maka ịgụ Baịbụl n'ụzọ kwesịrị ekwesị na n'ụzọ ziri ezi.

sections.description: Ọmụmụ ihe gbasara ihe ọ pụtara ịbụ mmadụ — nke e kere n'onyinyo Chineke, nke e ji ihe dị ndụ mee, ma kee maka nzube.

subsections.name: Ihe okike
subsections.description: Chineke dịka Onye Okike nke ihe niile — na ihe nke ahụ pụtara maka otú anyị si ele ụwa anya.

subsections.name: Foto Chineke
subsections.description: Ihe ọ pụtara bụ na e kere mmadụ n'oyiyi Chineke, nakwa ùgwù nke na-enye onye ọ bụla.

subsections.name: Ebumnobi
subsections.description: Ịdị mma nke inwe ahụ, na ihe Akwụkwọ Nsọ na-ekwu maka ịdị ndụ anụ ahụ.

subsections.name: Ebumnuche
subsections.description: Ihe mere anyị ji nọrọ ebe a — ọkpụkpọ mmadụ nke ịhụ Chineke n'anya, ijere ndị ọzọ ozi, na okike onye nlekọta.

sections.description: Ọmụmụ ihe gbasara mmehie — mmalite ya, ọdịdị ya, na mmetụta ọjọọ ya n'ahụ ụmụ mmadụ na ụwa.

subsections.name: Ọdịdị nke Mmehie
subsections.description: Ihe mmehie bụ n'ezie — ọ bụghị naanị imebi iwu, kama ọ bụ isi ihe na-agbakụta Chineke azụ.

subsections.name: Ọdịda
subsections.description: Ihe mere na Jenesis nke atọ, na otu o si metụta mmadụ niile.

subsections.name: Ọnwụnwa
subsections.description: Otu ọnwụnwa si arụ ọrụ, na otu ndị kwere ekwe ga-esi guzogide ya.

sections.description: Ọmụmụ ihe gbasara onye Jizọs Kraịst bụ - Chineke zuru oke na mmadụ zuru oke - na ihe ọbịbịa ya pụtara.

subsections.name: Onye nke Kraịst
subsections.description: Ozizi nke ọdịdị abụọ ahụ — otú Jizọs si bụrụ ma Chineke ma mmadụ zuru oke.

subsections.name: Ịdị ndụ
subsections.description: Ihe mere Ọkpara Chineke ji bụrụ anụ ahụ, na ihe mmadụ ya pụtara nye anyị.

sections.description: Olee otu Chineke si anapụta ndị mmehie? Ọmụmụ ihe gbasara mkpuchi mmehie, izi ezi, nnabata, na ihe niile Chineke na-eme iji zọpụta anyị.

subsections.name: Mkpuchi Mmehie
subsections.description: Otu ọnwụ Kraịst si emeso mmehie — nnọchi, mgbapụta, ime udo, na ihe ndị ọzọ.

subsections.name: Mgbanwe
subsections.description: Ihe ọ pụtara bụ ịpụ n'ime mmehie ma tụkwasị Kraịst obi — nchegharị na okwukwe.

subsections.name: Nkọwapụta
subsections.description: Ịbụ onye ezi omume n'ihu Chineke — site na amara naanị, site na okwukwe naanị, na Kraịst naanị.

subsections.name: Nkuchi
subsections.description: Onyinye pụrụ iche nke ịbụ onye a kpọbatara n'ezinụlọ Chineke dị ka ụmụ ya ndị nwoke na ndị nwanyị.

sections.description: Ọmụmụ ihe gbasara Mmụọ Nsọ - onye ọ bụ, ihe ọ na-eme, na otu o si arụ ọrụ n'ime ndị kwere ekwe na chọọchị.

subsections.name: Onye nke Mmụọ Nsọ
subsections.description: Mmụọ Nsọ dịka onye nke atọ n'ime Atọ n'Ime Otu — ọ bụghị ike, kama onye.

subsections.name: Mkpụrụ nke Mmụọ Nsọ
subsections.description: Àgwà àgwà nke Mmụọ Nsọ na-emepụta n'ime ndị na-eso ya eje ije.

subsections.name: Onyinye Ime Mmụọ
subsections.description: Onyinye nke Mmụọ Nsọ na-enye iji kwadebe ndị kwere ekwe maka ọrụ n'ahụ Kraịst.

sections.description: Gịnị bụ ụka, gịnịkwa mere o ji dị mkpa? Ọmụmụ ihe gbasara ọdịdị, ọrụ, na nhazi nke ahụ Kraịst.

subsections.name: Ọdịdị nke Chọọchị
subsections.description: Ihe ụka bụ — ndị Chineke, ahụ Kraịst, ụlọ nsọ nke Mmụọ Nsọ.

subsections.name: Sakrament
subsections.description: Baptizim na Nri Anyasị Onyenweanyị — ihe ha bụ, ihe ha pụtara, na otu esi edebe ha.

subsections.name: Ọchịchị
subsections.description: Ụkpụrụ nduzi ụka dị na Baịbụl: ndị okenye, ndị dikọn, na ikike sitere n'obi ohu.

subsections.name: Ofufe
subsections.description: Ihe ofufe Ndị Kraịst bụ, ihe mere o ji dị mkpa, na otu o si akpụzi ndụ obodo.

sections.description: Ọmụmụ ihe gbasara ọnwụ, mbilite n'ọnwụ, ikpe, na ihe e kere eke ọhụrụ - olileanya nke na-akpụzi otú Ndị Kraịst si ebi ndụ ugbu a.

subsections.name: Nlaghachi nke Kraịst
subsections.description: Olileanya doro anya na Jisọs ga-alọghachi n'ebube ikpe ndị dị ndụ na ndị nwụrụ anwụ ikpe.

subsections.name: Ikpe
subsections.description: Ikpe ikpeazụ nke Chineke ga-ekpe mmadụ niile ikpe—nakwa ozi ọma na Kraịst eburula ikpe maka ndị nke ya.

subsections.name: Eluigwe na Hel
subsections.description: Akwụkwọ Nsọ na-akọwa akara aka ebighị ebi — na ihe mere ha ji dị mkpa maka otu anyị si ebi ndụ ugbu a.

description: Ọmụmụ ihe ndị na-ejikọta eziokwu Baịbụl na ahụmịhe kwa ụbọchị nke iso Kraịst — na mmekọrịta, ọrụ, njirimara, na ọgụ na-aga n'ihu megide mmehie.

sections.description: Omume ndị na-azụ anyị ịnọ Chineke nso ma na-eto n'ime nsọpụrụ Chineke - ọ bụghị ụzọ isi nweta ihu ọma, kama omume ndị na-eme ka anyị dịrị njikere maka amara ya.

subsections.name: Ekpere
subsections.description: Ịgwa Chineke okwu — ntọala ya, ọdịdị ya, na otu esi azụlite ndụ ekpere bara ụba.

subsections.name: Ịgụ Baịbụl
subsections.description: Otu esi agụ Akwụkwọ Nsọ nke ọma — na nghọta, ịdị n'otu, na atụmanya nke mgbanwe.

subsections.name: Ofufe
subsections.description: Ofufe dị ka ihe a na-eme ná ndụ dum, ọ bụghị naanị ihe omume Sọnde.

sections.description: Usoro na-aga n'ihu nke ịghọ ihe dị ka Kraịst — ịlụso mmehie ọgụ, itolite n'omume ọma, na ịghọta onye anyị bụ n'ime ya.

subsections.name: Mkpụrụ nke Mmụọ Nsọ
subsections.description: Ịhụnanya, ọṅụ, udo, ndidi, obiọma, ịdị mma, ikwesị ntụkwasị obi, ịdị nwayọọ, na njide onwe onye.

subsections.name: Imeri Mmehie
subsections.description: Enyemaka bara uru na nke okpukpe maka ịnagide ụdị mmehie na-adịgide adịgide.

subsections.name: Uto n'Amara
subsections.description: Ihe o yiri ka ọ na-eto eto dịka Onye Kraịst — na ihe na-egbochi ya.

subsections.name: Njirimara n'ime Kraịst
subsections.description: Onye anyị bụ n'ihi ihe Kraịst mere — na ihe kpatara nke ahụ ji agbanwe ihe niile.

sections.description: Ọmụmụ ihe gbasara mmekọrịta Chineke tinyere anyị n'ime ya - alụmdi na nwunye, ezinụlọ, ọbụbụenyi, na obodo.

subsections.name: Alụmdi na nwunye
subsections.description: Ọgbụgba ndụ alụmdi na nwunye — ebumnuche ya, ihe ịma aka ya, na onyinyo ya nke Kraịst na chọọchị.

subsections.name: Ịnọghị di ma ọ bụ nwunye
subsections.description: Ịbụ onye na-alụbeghị di ma ọ bụ nwunye dị ka oku zuru oke na nke bara uru, ọ bụghị ebe a na-eche maka alụmdi na nwunye.

subsections.name: Ịzụ ụmụ
subsections.description: Ịzụlite ụmụ n'okwukwe — site n'amara, eziokwu, na echiche ogologo oge.

subsections.name: Ọbụbụenyi
subsections.description: Onyinye nke ọbụbụenyi Ndị Kraịst — na otu esi azụlite mmekọrịta ndị miri emi.

subsections.name: Nkwurịta okwu
subsections.description: Na-ekwu eziokwu na obiọma — na ige ntị nke ọma.

subsections.name: Obodo
subsections.description: Ihe ọ pụtara ibi ndụ dịka ahụ Kraịst — ibu ibu arọ nke ibe anyị.

sections.description: Ọmụmụ ihe gbasara itinye ozi ọma n'ọrụ, ego, oge, na ọchịchọ — ịhụ ọrụ kwa ụbọchị dị ka akụkụ nke nzube Chineke.

subsections.name: Ndụ Ọrụ
subsections.description: Ihe Baịbụl kwuru gbasara ọrụ — ịdị mma ya, ihe mwute ya, na mgbapụta ya n'ime Kraịst.

subsections.name: Ego na ihe onwunwe
subsections.description: Mmesapụ aka, afọ ojuju, na echiche Baịbụl banyere akụnụba.

subsections.name: Nlekọta nke Oge
subsections.description: Otu anyị si eji oge anyị eme ihe — na otu ozi ọma si agbanwe ihe ndị kacha mkpa anyị.

subsections.name: Ọchịchọ
subsections.description: Ọchịchọ dị nsọ megide ọchịchọ onwe onye — na otu esi amata ọdịiche dị.

subsections.name: Ezumike ezumike nká
subsections.description: Ihe ndụ kwesịrị ntụkwasị obi dị ka ya n'oge ikpeazụ nke ndụ.

sections.description: Otu ndị kwere ekwe si eche echiche ma mee ihe gbasara ajụjụ omume dị mkpa nke oge anyị - site na ikpe ziri ezi ọha mmadụ ruo na ụkpụrụ omume bio ruo na teknụzụ.

subsections.name: Ikpe Ziri Ezi nke Mmekọrịta
subsections.description: Obi Chineke maka ndị na-adịghị ike na ndị a na-emegbu, na ihe nke ahụ pụtara nye anyị.

subsections.name: Ụkpụrụ omume bayọlọjik
subsections.description: Mmalite na njedebe nke nsogbu ndụ — e jiri nlekọta okpukpe na ọmịiko bịakwute ya.

subsections.name: Teknụzụ Na-adọrọ adọrọ
subsections.description: Otu esi eji teknụzụ eme ihe n'eziokwu n'ụwa nke e ji ya kpụọ.

sections.description: Ọmụmụ ihe ndị na-enyere ndị kwere ekwe aka ịgafe ihe mgbu, enweghị obi ike, na ihe isi ike site n'ikwu eziokwu na olileanya.

subsections.name: Ọnwụnwa na Nsogbu
subsections.description: Ihe mere Chineke ji kwere ka nhụjuanya dịrị, na otu Akwụkwọ Nsọ si akwado anyị iji olileanya nagide ya.

subsections.name: Ịghọta Uche Chineke
subsections.description: Otu esi eme mkpebi amamihe dị na ya - na ihe Akwụkwọ Nsọ kwere nkwa n'ezie gbasara nduzi.

subsections.name: Ahụike Uche
subsections.description: Ịda mbà n'obi, nchekasị, na nsogbu ndị ọzọ — e jiri ọmịiko na nlekọta Baịbụl mee ihe.

subsections.name: Iru újú
subsections.description: Otu esi eru uju dịka ndị nwere olileanya — n'eziokwu, ọ bụghị naanị ha.

description: Ọmụmụ ihe maka ndị na-ejere ndị ọzọ ozi — n'ozi ọma, nlekọta ndị okenye, izi ihe, na idu ndú. Site n'Akwụkwọ Nsọ, ọmụmụ ihe ndị a na-enyere ndị kwere ekwe aka ije ozi nke ọma na nke ga-adịgide.

sections.description: Ntọala Baịbụl maka ozi Ndị Kraịst niile — ihe ọ pụtara ijere ozi, na ụdị onye ohu ahụ ga-abụ.

subsections.name: Ọchịchị Ndị Ojere
subsections.description: Idu ndú dịka Jisọs si duru — site n'ịdị umeala n'obi, ịchụ àjà, na nlekọta maka ndị a na-ejere ozi.

subsections.name: Ịkpọ oku
subsections.description: Ịghọta ọkpụkpọ oku gị maka ozi - otu esi achọpụta ya na ihe ọ gụnyere.

sections.description: Ọmụmụ ihe maka ndị a kpọrọ ka ha kọwaa Baịbụl n'ihu ọha - nke na-ekpuchi usoro, àgwà, na ibu ọrụ nke iji Okwu Chineke eme ihe.

subsections.name: Nkwusa Ihe Ngosi
subsections.description: Otu esi ekwusa ozi ọma n'eziokwu site n'ihe e dere n'akwụkwọ nsọ — ikwe ka Baịbụl tọọ ihe a ga-eme.

subsections.name: Ndị Na-eduzi Ọmụmụ Baịbụl
subsections.description: Otu esi eduzi otu nke ọma — ịjụ ajụjụ dị mma na inyere ndị mmadụ aka izute Chineke n'ihe odide ahụ.

sections.description: Akụkụ bara uru na nke nkà mmụta okpukpe nke iduzi ụka ma ọ bụ ozi - ọhụụ, otu, esemokwu, na ọchịchị.

subsections.name: Ọhụụ na Atụmatụ
subsections.description: Otu esi eche echiche nke ọma gbasara ebe Chineke na-edu na otu esi aga ebe ahụ ọnụ.

subsections.name: Iwulite Ndị otu
subsections.description: Ịchịkọta, ịmepụta, na ịkwado otu ndị otu ozi dị mma.

subsections.name: Mkpebi Esemokwu
subsections.description: Otu esi ejikwa esemokwu na nkewa n'ụzọ ga-asọpụrụ Chineke ma chekwaa ịdị n'otu.

subsections.name: Ọchịchị Chọọchị
subsections.description: Nhazi na usoro ndị na-enyere ụka aka ịbụ ndị a ga-aza ajụjụ ma hazie nke ọma.

sections.description: Ọmụmụ ihe na-akwado ndị kwere ekwe ka ha soro ibe ha na-eje ije n'ihe isi ike, ọnwụ, nsogbu, na mkpa.

subsections.name: Mkparịta ụka Ndị Ọzụzụ Atụrụ
subsections.description: Nkà na ọnọdụ dị mkpa maka mkparịta ụka ozi ọma nke otu onye na otu.

subsections.name: Ntinye Aka n'Ọrịa
subsections.description: Otu esi emeso mmadụ ihe n'ụzọ amamihe na ọmịiko mgbe ọ nọ n'ọnọdụ dị oke njọ.

subsections.name: Nleta
subsections.description: Ozi nke ọnụnọ — ileta ndị ọrịa, ndị agadi, na ndị na-anaghị apụ apụ n'ụlọ.

subsections.name: Nkwadebe maka Alụmdi na Nwunye
subsections.description: Inyere di na nwunye aka ịkwadebe maka alụmdi na nwunye nke e wusiri ike na Kraịst.

subsections.name: Nlekọta Ịnwụ Újú
subsections.description: Ije ije na ndị na-eru uju — ihe a ga-ekwu, ihe a na-agaghị ekwu, na otu esi anọgide.

sections.description: Ọmụmụ ihe gbasara iwegara ndị na-anụbeghị ozi ọma ahụ — n'onwe ha, n'ógbè ha, na n'ofe omenala.

subsections.name: Ịgba Àmà Onwe Onye
subsections.description: Otu esi ekerịta okwukwe gị n'ụzọ ebumpụta ụwa na nke doro anya n'okwu kwa ụbọchị.

subsections.name: Ịgbaghara Ndị Mmadụ
subsections.description: Ịza ajụjụ ndị na-egbochi ndị mmadụ iwere Iso Ụzọ Kraịst dị ka ihe dị mkpa.

subsections.name: Ozi Omenala Dị Iche Iche
subsections.description: Ije ozi na ịkekọrịta ókèala omenala n'ụzọ mmetụta uche na nkwanye ùgwù.

subsections.name: Ịkụ Ụlọ Nzukọ
subsections.description: Nkà mmụta okpukpe na omume nke ịmepụta obodo ozi ọma ọhụrụ.

sections.section: Ịbụ onye na-eso ụzọ na onye ndụmọdụ
sections.description: Ọmụmụ ihe gbasara ozi nke inyere ndị ọzọ aka itolite — otu otu, n'obere ìgwè, na site n'ịzụ ọgbọ na-abịa.

subsections.name: Ozi Otu-na-Otu
subsections.description: Ike nke ịbụ onye na-eso ụzọ n'ebumnobi na nke onwe — na-ezukọ mgbe niile iji meghee Baịbụl ọnụ.

subsections.name: Ndị Ndú Otu Obere
subsections.description: Otu esi eduzi obere otu nke bụ ezigbo mmadụ, nke na-eto eto, ma dabere n'Akwụkwọ Nsọ.

subsections.name: Ịzụ Ndị Ọzọ
subsections.description: Ịkwadebe ndị ọzọ ịrụ ọrụ nke ozi — ime ka ndị a tọghatara ghọọ ndị na-eme mgbanwe, ọ bụghị naanị ndị ndu.

description: Ọmụmụ ihe ndị na-adabaghị nke ọma n'ime otu ọzọ — ma ọ bụ nke edobebeghị ozi nchekwa ha.
